channel.title: Gramin-Nyaya Legal Aid Society News
channel.description: Latest news, documentation updates, and statutory guides for offline-first legal empowerment in rural India.

item.title: Registration Act, 1908: Offline Legal Guide Launch
item.description: Gramin-Nyaya has successfully deployed a comprehensive interactive guide and assistant for the Registration Act, 1908, helping rural citizens learn about property registration, death certificate mutations, and statutory inheritance rules in their own regional languages.
